title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mastech Holdings

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mastech Holdings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Mastech Holdings in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mastech Holdings:
Mastech Holdings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings!
